title: Trojan Reach NPC Role
note: Used in CONJUNCTION with the AC Character Crafter: roll the Crafter for the person, this table for their place in the Reach. Layer faction-true wants from interpretation.md/setting-canon.md.

entries.value: Free trader captain / independent merchant (potential prey, contact, or rival)
Mercenary or hired gun (for sale, or hunting the crew)
Imperial Navy officer or rating (the law / a future hunter)
Customs officer, port authority, or law enforcement
World noble / aristocrat / planetary ruler or heir
GeDeCo or megacorp agent / executive / advisor
Spy or intelligence operative (Imperial, corporate, or freelance)
Pirate / corsair from a rival crew (Theev or freelance)
Aslan warrior or ihatei (landless, land-hungry, honour-bound)
Aslan noble / clan official / tihalu (clan administrator)
Scholar, scientist, or engineer (Sindal lore, lost tech)
Priest or cultist (Clarke Psychopomp, Marduk sea-cult, fringe faith)
Drifter, refugee, escaped slave, or outcast (a loose thread)
